UpdateDeploySet.name: Deploy set name (at least one of name or desc is required)
UpdateDeploySet.desc: Deploy set description (at least one of name or desc is required); only Chinese characters, letters, digits, periods ".", spaces, underscores "_", hyphens "-", equals signs "=", English commas ",", Chinese commas "，", colons "：", slashes "/" and Chinese periods "。" are allowed
